title: chore(sops): add Itachi (@dr-misterio) as age recipient
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keys to the hive
gist.blurb: We've updated our secret vault's access list, giving another builder the keys they need to work on content safety features.
gist.summary: Added a new age encryption key to the SOPS configuration to grant an additional contributor access to development secrets.
gist.impact: This internal infrastructure update unblocks development on AWS Bedrock integrations while maintaining secure CI/CD pipelines.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, handing a shiny pixel key to the chunky monitor robot in front of a glowing digital vault.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, handing a glowing golden pixel key to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. A secure digital vault glows softly in the background. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
